non_goals: Any change to Jira or publication approval policy.
Declared-slice coverage enforcement, which belongs to Phase 3.
technical_acceptance_criteria: Make generation and standalone validation consume the same contract-aware validator.
Validate assignment-owned and source-derived values by equality with the persisted contract.
Bind plan and workflow state to the matching contract digest.
Remove the temporary assignment-authority trace mechanism.
Reject unsupported plan, contract, and workflow version combinations with an actionable migration or rejection message.
validation_plan: Run focused generation, workflow, CLI, and standalone-validation tests.
Run make test, make vet, make build, and git diff --check.
Obtain independent exact-diff reviewer and verifier evidence from distinct executors.
Run make review-gate for the exact staged diff.

handoff.status: ready for linked Phase 2 planning baseline
handoff.completed_work: Completed and reviewed REK-22, recorded its commit in Jira, moved REK-22 to In Review, and transitioned REK-23 to In Progress with read-back.
handoff.next_action: Commit this linked Phase 2 planning baseline, run implementation preflight, and implement only the unified-contract-validation slice.
